meaning: adj.青葱的,味美的,豪华的,繁荣的
examples: In the cold winter, daffodil foliage is still lush, full of vitality, to bring people the spring.
On one side stand new apartment buildings for civil servants, with luxury kitchens and a sprinkler system embedded in the lush lawn.
The hills are covered in lush green vegetation.
Noble says he used these lush harmonies as a basis for The Outsiders Are Back.
The estate is surrounded by lush green gardens full of native Mexican plants, geese and peacocks.
